title: Phase 008 — Shared Feedback Reducers (3 P0 Fixes + Aggregation + 3 Consumers)
description: Phase 008 — ADAPT pt-03 RQ-A3 + RQ-B3 + RQ-B4 as one packet: shared feedback aggregation reducer feeding three independent consumers (coco rerank weights, session-trace causal-edge inference, learned retention/decay). Sub-Phase 1 applies 3 P0 precondition fixes (auto-provenance cap broadening, manual-edge overwrite guard, retention-sweep tier basement). 5 sub-phases; ~400-650 prod LOC + ~480-810 tests. All 3 consumers default-off; live mutation requires Phase-005 eval. P0 fixes mandatory before Sub-Phases 4 (Consumer B) and 5 (Consumer C).
